resources.string: Are you sure you want to cancel all selected tags?
More Results, Less Precision. Pair anime with any selected tag rather than all.
The preview page is being updated by the site. Please try checking other months.
The preview page is being updated by the site. You can check the Getchu preview first. Getchu may require a VPN to access normally.
Check for Update Failed. Click to Retry.
New Version Available: %s. Click to View
Update download failed. Please try again later or download manually from GitHub Releases.
Tips:Long press a unit to clear all tags of the selected unit
Are you sure you want to delete %s?
Are you sure you want to delete?
Enable tablet layout for the video page, providing a larger viewing area
Only effective in tablet mode, adjust the number of columns on search, watch later, liked videos and subscription pages based on screen width
Set the number of video grid columns for different screen widths
Current device width reference: portrait ~%1$ddp, landscape ~%2$ddp
Current hit bucket: portrait %1$s = %2$d columns, landscape %3$s = %4$d columns
Disabling this feature will not delete your history data
When enabled, relevant components will be displayed at the top of the player
Welcome to submit your H Keyframes on GitHub. If you don\'t know how to submit, there are tutorial documents in the discussion area for reference.
Use the H Keyframes shared by kind-hearted people uploaded to GitHub
Priority to Use Shared H Keyframes
When both shared and local sets have H Keyframes for a video, the shared set is prioritized
Welcome to vent. Important information will also be posted here
If there\'s a bug, come and submit an issue
Detected H Keyframes shared by others
No H Keyframes shared by others detected
Mapping of hosts to IP provided by the app\nCustom hosts take priority if configured\nVPN? What\'s that?
Multiple IPs separated by commas, e.g. 1.2.3.4,5.6.7.8
Enter DoH endpoint IPs separated by commas. Built-in presets provide them automatically; custom URLs use system resolution when empty.
Connect/read timeout for DoH requests. 5–15 seconds is recommended.
Account or password may be incorrect
This method can only keep you logged in for 2 hours… It\'s still recommended to log in via the webpage,\nbut the webpage doesn\'t use Hosts, so you might need VPN
CI Update channel can get the latest changes faster,\nbut stability is not guaranteed
Don\'t worry, this is just for updating.\nIf you\'re not sure, you can download directly from GitHub
Please agree to notification permissions to receive download information in time!
No notifications will be sent during or after the process
Haven\'t seen any update popups lately!
You seem to have not written a description…
Copy the following content and share it with others. You can add it to your device by clicking the add button on the top right:\n%s
Detected Hanime1 related links in clipboard
Are you sure you want to log out?
Unable to get playback link for this video, will be redirected to browser
Are you sure you want to add the current time to the H Keyframe?
Long press 🥵 to add H Keyframe
Video has been deleted or moved, delete this entry?
You are currently watching this video~
Long press to cancel watch later!
Are you sure you want to delete all video watch histories?
Long press to delete history, the delete button in the upper right corner is responsible for deleting all history!
Your records will appear here after you start watching videos.
Pull to refresh and scroll to the bottom to load more.

Pull to refresh and scroll to the bottom to load more. Videos under review will show their current review status.The app does not support video uploading. Please upload via the web interface. Before uploading, please check whether the video has already been uploaded and fill in the video metadata correctly.
Videos that pass review and are uploaded successfully will appear here.
Failed to load uploaded videos. Tap to retry.
Queued, pending, or transcoding videos will appear here.
Failed to load videos in review. Tap to retry.
Interval too short, must be greater than %ds
Long press share to copy to clipboard
Are you sure you want to download?
Details of the video to be downloaded below
After downloading, you can find the downloaded video in the "Download" interface. Detailed storage paths are available in the "Settings" interface.
Modifying %s requires restarting the program, otherwise it will not take effect!
Are you sure you want to clear?
Are you sure you want to clear the cache?
The current cache is empty, no need to clean

If you find significant issues with the software but the update fails, please go directly to the Github Releases page to see if there is a latest version available\n\nAlso, I just found out that someone actually paid for this app, it\'s really unnecessary!

Note: If you also have H Keyframes with the same code as the other party, yours will be overwritten

Title: %1$s
Code: %2$s
%3$d moment(s) available

Changing the domain name requires restarting the program, otherwise it will not take effect!
 Different domains do not share the same cookies, so after changing the domain name, you need to log in again.
 So, except for hanime1.me, other domain names may redirect back to hanime1.me at certain times, which may cause cookies to expire
 
 Recommendations are as follows:
 · Non-VPN users, use hanime1.me and enable built-in Hosts
 · Japanese users, use hanime1.com
 · Users from other regions, use hanime1.me and disable built-in Hosts
Do not use Japanese IP address!!!
Seeing this message means their website has been reinforced. Whether it can be restored depends on fate…
Your login session has expired. You have been logged out automatically. Please sign in again.
Maybe this URL is parsed differently…
Your network may be unstable, please refresh more!
Network connection was interrupted. Check your connection and wait for automatic retry.
Connection timed out. The current network may be slow; retrying shortly.
Unable to resolve the download server. Check your network or DNS settings.
Unable to connect to the download server. Switch networks or try again later.
Unable to write the downloaded file. Check storage space, folder permission, or choose the download folder again.
The server cannot resume from the saved position. Delete this task and download it again.
Unable to get file size or download information. Try again later.
After application, quickly jump to this app when opening relevant web pages
MIUI has hidden this interface, so you need to open it from here and then add the link.
Are you sure you want to unsubscribe?
This device does not support opening deep link settings from the app
Are you sure you want to redownload?
Long press to understand the importance of enabling this for developers

Would you mind if the developer collected your device information and your usage? It will help the developer a lot.

Data analysis service is provided by Google Analytics for Firebase. Its privacy policy can be found at https://www.google.com/policies/privacy/.

If you agree to join data analysis, your device information and your usage will be collected, including but not limited to Android API version, equipment model, language residence, the application version, conversion time, function times. The developer promise that these information will NOT be collected, including phone number, e-mail address, IMEI.

Your information will not be collected until you agree to join data analysis.

The collected information will be analyzed by Google Analytics for Firebase. The analysis report can only be viewed by the developer of this application.
Try refreshing the page\nor your login may have expired
The website is blocked, changing to another domain name might work!
You can notify the developer, but don\'t rush them, the website being blocked is not their fault~
This device does not support this action
I noticed you seem to have downloaded the video with resolution %s
Open source projects used in this software
When enabled, screen lock verification is required to access the app, preventing others from opening it.
Your system version does not support screen lock verification, so this feature cannot be enabled.
Please enable fingerprint, pattern, or PIN lock in your system settings first.

🧩 This app is an independent third-party tool and is not affiliated with, partnered with, authorized by, or endorsed by https://hanime1.me/ or its related parties.

📢 Do not promote, repost, or drive traffic to this app on any public platform. If such activity creates risk, the maintainer may archive or hide the repository and remove compiled releases at any time.

🔍 This app only uses regular network requests and HTML DOM parsing to access information publicly displayed by the target website. It does not access backend databases, perform injection attacks, bypass authorization, or obtain non-public or private data.

⚖️ This app is provided only for technical research, mobile experience optimization, and learning purposes. It does not provide commercial services. Users must comply with local laws, regulations, and target website rules, and are solely responsible for all consequences of use.

©️ Original videos, images, text, and related content belong to https://hanime1.me/ or their original creators, producers, and distributors. This app does not store copyrighted content, modify original content, or claim ownership of any content.

🛡️ For copyright, DMCA, personal attack, or other content complaints, contact the source website directly. The app developer cannot handle or assist with such content disputes.

ℹ️ Please support the original website and its operators through official channels.

🔞 R18 warning: users under 18 are prohibited from downloading or using this app.

June 1, 2026
Use fingerprint, PIN, or pattern to unlock
We need to confirm it\'s really you Mast****tion🍄💦
When enabled, the comment section will be hidden on the video details page
The new passwords do not match

This import method can also alleviate login interception caused by cloudflare
1. After logging in on the web version, find a way to obtain the Cookies - either mobile or computer will work.
 2. The format should be approximately as shown in the image. Note! It should not contain double quotes at the beginning or end, and should not be a formatted Cookies sequence.
 Then use the \"Manual Import\" button to import.
 If after importing and refreshing the page it still shows as not logged in, then check your Cookies.
Please grant camera permission to scan the code
Allow entering picture-in-picture mode when returning to the desktop \n(Picture-in-picture permission needs to be enabled)
If the picture-in-picture permission is not authorized, it will be automatically closed.
Settings applied successfully. The app may close, and the app icon might take a while to update. During this time, you may see a \"Not installed\" prompt.
Enable built-in Hosts to detect latency\nDo not enable actual address resolution
%1$d times this month! You are legendary
%1$d days checked in this month, amazing!
Best streak: %1$d days! Keep it up
Consistency is key, keep checking in!
Long press a date to clear its check-in
%1$s seems empty…\nDid you forget to fap? 🥺
%1$s you came %2$d times\nAre you really going to suck it back? 😨
Don\'t forget your scheduled fap session!
Create a calendar reminder for %1$s?\nMake sure you show up on time! 🫡
Check whether current DoH settings can resolve the domain
DoH and built-in DNS mapping cannot be enabled at the same time. Enabling one will automatically disable the other.
%1$d day streak! Can\'t stop, won\'t stop! 🫡
Happy Singles\' Day… not fapping today? 😢
Fap tracker widget — check in from home screen
Your launcher does not support direct widget pinning
Find "Fap Tracker" and tap to add
Something went wrong, please contact the developer!
Read the downloaded files in the current download directory to restore previously downloaded files to the list.\nEach video unit file structure should be:\n[video code]/xxx.mp4, xxx.png, info.json
Please select a custom directory first
Some videos have been moved or deleted, please check.
No directory selected, no changes made

Use the system file picker to choose a folder:

✓ Choose storage location freely
✓ Download files saved permanently
✓ Easy to share with other apps
✓ Uninstalling the app won't affect files
✓ Resume downloads supported

Do not move, rename, or revoke permission for this folder, or you will need to choose it again. Creating a new folder under Downloads or using a custom folder is recommended.

Confirm to restore to app internal storage?

● Current downloaded files will not be moved
● Subsequent downloads will save to app internal
● Files will be cleared when app is uninstalled
● After selecting external path, you can use file migration feature
You are using app internal storage space.\n\nIf needed, you can specify external storage path to better manage files.
Do not close APP during export to avoid file corruption!
No exportable files in private path
Currently using app internal storage directory or custom path is empty or permission lost
Export all download items from private download directory to custom directory

Due to external storage permissions or other reasons, the video info file failed to save.\nAutomatically switched to app private path.\nIf you reinstalled the app, try cleaning the Download/Han1meViewer directory and switch download location in settings. Otherwise, continue using private directory and please move out files before uninstalling or clearing data!
Tap to set path, long press to reset to default
Please select a reporting reason first.
Report failed, reason: %s, please contact developer
The comment is too short, please enter at least 5 characters
Follow system theme colors after enabling, only supported on Android 12+
Permission error, please try to re-specify the folder!
Automatically jump to the last playback position if there is play history
This app has been maliciously tampered with! Please pay attention to information security!
Configurable only when MPV is selected as playback engine
Configure advanced options for quality, performance & network cache
Improve smoothness of low frame rate videos, but increases power consumption
Reduce color banding in dark scenes or gradient areas
Slightly drop frames when GPU is busy to avoid stuttering
Use hardware acceleration to improve playback performance, If black screen occurs with hardware decoding on some devices, try disabling it
Adjust cache size to adapt to network fluctuations
Temporarily disable verification for sites with abnormal certificates
New renderer, may be unstable (Anime4K not supported)
Configure player startup parameters/configs in key,parameters format, separated by semicolons
Note: Some parameters may not take effect due to different player platforms
Standard Hardware Decoding + Render Passthrough (HW+: mediacodec)

Please complete Cloudflare verification and wait for the page to close automatically.\n Outdated WebView component may cause verification failure or loop verification! If verification fails, please upgrade WebView or go to Settings->Network Settings->Domain to switch to alternative domains (other domains may have lower risk control restrictions).
When enabled, clicking avatar on details page to search artist will not include video type.
When enabled, shows played indicator at top-right corner of video covers on search results page
Adjust how many cards are visible at once in horizontal lists such as Home and related videos
Set how many cards should be visible at once for different screen widths
When enabled, no warning will be shown when playing with mobile data
Note: MPV playback engine does not support SOCKS proxy, playback may fail
When enabled, groups will be collapsed by default when entering downloaded page
Are you sure you want to delete the group \"%1$s\"? Videos in this group will be moved to default group.
\n⚠️ WebView version is too low, verification may fail, recommended version is 120.x.x.x or above
Are you sure you want to switch site?
System WebView component is abnormal, Cloudflare verification page failed to load!
When enabled, the back gesture will only trigger after releasing, preventing accidental back navigation while watching videos
Please go to Settings and enable storage permission so downloads can be saved.
Downloads cannot be saved without storage permission
Some ROMs do not support guided widget pinning. Please add the widget manually.

string-array.name: search_placeholders
string-array.item: Explore the secrets deep within…
Drift with the night wind, find your solace
Looking for something different tonight?
Search for what you truly love
Don\'t be shy, take a look
Trending now: Everyone is searching for…
Fasten your seatbelt, let\'s go
Can we have a private word?
Enter the word you dare not speak
Unlock your hidden desires
What\'s the keyword that makes you blush?
Midnight curiosity starts here…
Shh, this is a secret between just the two of us…
Tsundere as you are, you really want to search for *that*, right?
Hold on tight! Things are getting pretty intense here~
Bro, mind stepping over here for a quick chat?
D-Don\'t go typing anything weird, okay?!
No cameras here, feel free to search secretly~
It\'s late… time to satisfy your curiosity~
Got something good? Care to share it with me?
The gateway to a new world. Enter the password to open!
Be good now, let me see what you\'re looking for~
The search bar is all cleaned up, please enjoy~
The search bar knows exactly what\'s on your mind…
Beep! Student card / culture card, please swipe to search!
What are you longing for? Whisper it to me…
Search now, and open the gate to an ecchi new world!

resources.string: You need to restart the program, otherwise it won\'t work!
Cranking the hog so hard the engine literally blew up.
Are you sure you want to delete %d videos?
Are you sure you want to move %1$d videos to group %2$s?

We detected that your IP is located in Japan or has been blacklisted by CloudFlare. This is not an issue with the app itself. For security reasons, CloudFlare periodically blocks certain high-risk IP addresses. We recommend switching to a different VPN node or changing your network environment before trying again.

Unable to verify under the current network environment. If you are using built‑in hosts to access the site, please note that the CloudFlare verification page does not currently support custom hosts resolution. This may cause the verification node and the main site to be resolved to different regions, leading to inconsistent access environments and verification failures. This issue cannot be resolved at the moment. Please try switching to a “cleaner” IP or network environment and try again.

SSL secure connection failed. This may be due to incorrect system time, network interception, or certificate verification failure. Please check your time settings and switch to another network environment before retrying.
Failed to parse the webpage. The page structure may have changed. Please contact the developer for an update, or use the web version as a temporary workaround.
Unable to resolve the server address. Please check your network connection or DNS settings and try again.
The connection timed out. Your network may be slow or the server may not be responding. Please try again later.
Secure connection failed. Please check that your system time is correct, or switch networks and try again.
Unable to connect to the server. Please check whether your network is available, or try again later.
The connection was interrupted. The current network may be unstable or the server may have disconnected. Please switch networks and try again.
The connection was reset. The current network may be unstable or access may be blocked. Please switch networks and try again.
The server refused this request. Please try again later, or check your current site/network settings.
The requested content was not found. The site content may have changed. Please try again later.
The server is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
Failed to load the page. Please check your network connection and try again.
Export settings, watch history, download groups and video info, H keyframes, and check-in records for device migration
Restore settings, watch history, download groups and video info, H keyframes, and check-in records from a backup file
Importing will overwrite current settings, watch history, download groups and video info, H keyframes, and check-in records. The backup does not include video files. Continue?
Failed to import data backup. Please check whether the file is valid.
Long press and drag a section to reorder it. Turn off the switch to hide a section.

string-array.name: loading_hints
string-array.item: Hmph! I-it\'s not like I kept you waiting or anything! The data is just running a tiny bit slow!
Idiot! Staring at it won\'t make it go any faster! …Fine, just give me three more seconds!
(*Nom nom*)… Ah! You caught me! Let me just swallow this cookie and I\'ll be right there!
Whoa! It looks like the data cables ahead got tangled up!
Hard at work carrying happiness to you…
The loading bar is sneaking a bite of a delicious cupcake. Current progress: 2/3 eaten!
O loading bar, which hides the powers of darkness… Reveal your true speed before me!
Synchronizing alternative world signals… Beep beep—waves alignment rate at 99%!
I know you\'re eager, but don\'t rush~ Take a moment to blink and relax your neck!
Currently disciplining some disobedient code, just a tiny moment!
Onii-chan, the loading bar ahead is still quite long…
Activate Magic Card: Pot of Greed! Draw more loading time from the deck!
Your loading request has been prioritized by the Hero\'s Party! Current rank: No. 1!
Excitedly rubbing hands together in anticipation…
◝(⑅•ᴗ•⑅)◜..°♡ Teleporting…
